title: Somarama
tagline: Somarama — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Somarama is one of the five Pancharama Kshetras that are sacred to the Hindu god Shiva.
overview.description: Somarama is one of the five Pancharama Kshetras that are sacred to the Hindu god Shiva. The temple is located in Bhimavaram of West Godavari district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the centrally protected monuments of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Bhimavaram mandal
topPlaces.description: Bhimavaram mandal is one of the 19 mandals in West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It has headquarters at Bhimavaram town.

topPlaces.name: Bhimavaram
topPlaces.description: Bhimavaram is a town and headquarters of West Godavari district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the administrative headquarters of Bhimavaram mandal in Bhimavaram revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kovvada, West Godavari
topPlaces.description: Kovvada is a village in West Godavari district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Chinamiram
topPlaces.description: Chinamiram is a village in Bhimavaram mandal, located in West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. As of 2011 census, the village partly an out growth to Bhimavaram city.

topPlaces.name: Annavaram, West Godavari
topPlaces.description: Annavaram is a village in West Godavari district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Palacoderu mandal
topPlaces.description: Palacoderu mandal is one of the 19 mandals in the West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The headquarters are located at Palacoderu town.

topPlaces.name: Palakoderu
topPlaces.description: Palakoderu is a village in West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Pennada Agraharam
topPlaces.description: Pennada Agraharam is a village is located on National Highway 214 between Bhimavaram and Palakollu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Somarama?
faq.a: The best time to visit Somarama is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Somarama?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Somarama at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Somarama?
faq.a: Stays in Somarama start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Somarama?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhimavaram mandal, Bhimavaram, Kovvada, West Godavari, Chinamiram, Annavaram, West Godavari.
